question:
Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[0, -0.5, 1.5], [-0.5, 1, 1], [1.5, 1, -2]]
A_1 = [[1, -0.5, 2], [-0.5, 0, 1], [2, 1, 0]]
A_2 = [[-2, 1, -1.5], [1, 0, 2.5], [-1.5, 2.5, 3]]
b_1 = 33.0, b_2 = -32.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[-1, -2, -1], [-2, 2, -1], [-1, -1, 1]]
A_1 = [[-3, -2, -0.5], [-2, 1, 2.5], [-0.5, 2.5, -1]]
A_2 = [[-2, 0, -1], [0, -3, -1], [-1, -1, 1]]
b_1 = 7.0, b_2 = -22.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[-2, 1, 1], [1, 2, -2.5], [1, -2.5, -1]]
A_1 = [[3, 2.5, 1], [2.5, 0, 2], [1, 2, -3]]
A_2 = [[1, -1.5, 1.5], [-1.5, 1, 1.5], [1.5, 1.5, -3]]
b_1 = -7.0, b_2 = 21.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[1, 1.5, -3], [1.5, -3, -1], [-3, -1, -1]]
A_1 = [[2, -1, 0.5], [-1, 0, 0], [0.5, 0, -3]]
A_2 = [[2, -0.5, 0], [-0.5, 1, 2], [0, 2, -1]]
b_1 = 6.0, b_2 = 34.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[0, 1.5, 2], [1.5, 1, 0], [2, 0, 3]]
A_1 = [[-3, 0, 0], [0, 3, 0.5], [0, 0.5, -3]]
A_2 = [[-1, 1.5, 0.5], [1.5, -3, -0.5], [0.5, -0.5, 2]]
b_1 = -18.0, b_2 = 4.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[-1, 0, 0], [0, -3, -1], [0, -1, 2]]
A_1 = [[3, 0.5, -0.5], [0.5, 0, 2.5], [-0.5, 2.5, 2]]
A_2 = [[-1, 0.5, 1], [0.5, -3, 0.5], [1, 0.5, -2]]
b_1 = 48.0, b_2 = -33.0

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[-3, 0.5, 1], [0.5, 0, 1], [1, 1, -1]]
A_1 = [[1, 1, 0.5], [1, -3, -0.5], [0.5, -0.5, 2]]

b_1 = -9.0, b_2 = 16.0

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[-2, -0.5, -1.5], [-0.5, 2, -1], [-1.5, -1, 1]]

A_2 = [[2, -2, -2], [-2, -2, 1], [-2, 1, 1]]
b_1 = -20.0, b_2 = 39.0

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[-3, -0.5, 0.5], [-0.5, -3, -0.5], [0.5, -0.5, -1]]
A_1 = [[1, 0, -1], [0, 3, -1.5], [-1, -1.5, 0]]
A_2 = [[-3, -0.5, -1.5], [-0.5, 0, -1.5], [-1.5, -1.5, -2]]

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 3x3 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..2, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).

C = [[1, 2.5, -2], [2.5, -1, -0.5], [-2, -0.5, 0]]
A_1 = [[-1, 0, -0.5], [0, 2, 0.5], [-0.5, 0.5, -2]]
A_2 = [[-2, -1, 0], [-1, -1, 0], [0, 0, -3]]
b_1 = -19.0, b_2 = -53.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?
